{{Quote|You are to take the NavStar freighter to Da'Harrin Spaceport on Greyman's Planet in the Soarin System. There you will meet with Roger Stern of Stern Traders. He is a Rebel sympathizer and will provide the supplies you are to pick up.|The commander of the Tancon Rebel Alliance base, to a team of Rebel agents|<ref name="MilkRun" />}}
'''Greyman's Planet''' was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrialized]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]]. It was controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and at one point the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] executed a [[Mission to Karinda|mission]] to transport supplies from it to the Alliance's [[Karinda Outpost|outpost]] on the planet [[Karinda]]. As part of the mission, a team of Rebel agents, posing as employees of a [[NavStar Transport|front company]], were able to retrieve the impounded supplies from [[Da'Harrin Spaceport]] on Greyman's Planet and, after a [[Space warfare/Legends|shootout]] with an Imperial patrol, their [[Arion Star|light freighter]] departed the planet's [[Soarin system|star system]].

==Description==
Greyman's Planet was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Soarin system]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Wazta sector/Legends|Wazta sector]].<ref name="EAOC Soarin" /> It was situated at a distance of two [[Standard day/Legends|days']] travel with a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] equipped with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] from both the planet [[Karinda]] in the [[Karinda system/Legends|Karinda system]] and the planet [[Tancon]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> of the [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]].<ref name="EAOC Tancon">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Tancon system/Legends|Tancon system]]</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|You must first pick up the supplies on an Imperial planet. That shouldn't cause you concern, as we have prepared a cover.|The commander of the Tancon Rebel Alliance base, to a team of Rebel agents|<ref name="MilkRun" />}}
[[File:Wazta_sector.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The Rebel Alliance carried out a mission to deliver supplies between Greyman's Planet and the planet Karinda, both in the Wazta sector (pictured).]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Greyman's Planet was under the control of the Empire.<ref name="MilkRun" /> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Dates">"[[Milk Run]]" is set between the events of {{Film|IV}} and {{Film|V}}, which corresponds to the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the Alliance formulated a plan for a [[Mission to Karinda|mission]] to deliver supplies from [[Da'Harrin Spaceport]] on Greyman's Planet to the Rebel [[Karinda Outpost]] on the planet of the same name. At the Alliance base on Tancon, the coordinates for Greyman's Planet were loaded in the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] of the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Arion Star]]'', and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]-based landing permits for the planet were also placed aboard, after which the base's [[Unidentified Rebel Alliance commander (Tancon)|commander]] briefed a team of agents on the mission.<ref name="MilkRun" />

{{RPG|"[[Milk Run]]"}}
[[File:DaHarrinSpaceport-Polyhedron83.jpg|thumb|left|300px|On Greyman's Planet, the Rebel Alliance team retrieved the impounded supplies from Da'Harrin Spaceport (layout depicted).]]
Posing as employees of the Alliance front company [[NavStar Transport]], the team traveled to Greyman's Planet aboard the ''Arion Star''. Before the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] began its landing cycle, it was hailed from the planet with instructions to transmit its landing permit code, after which the vessel was assigned a landing pad in Da'Harrin Spaceport. In the [[City/Legends|city]] housing Da'Harrin Spaceport, the Rebel agents learned that [[Roger Stern]] of the company [[Stern Traders]]—the contact from which they were to pick up the supplies—had recently been arrested by the Empire. The arrest threw the entire [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] into a state of chaos, with the local [[Greyman's Planet planetary government|planetary government]] struggling to shut down Stern Traders and impounding its freights due to the large volume of goods that the business had been handling.<ref name="MilkRun" />

The agents subsequently retrieved their cargo of supplies that had been impounded at the spaceport. However, when the ''Arion Star'', which had not been given authorization to launch, traveled off Greyman's Planet, it was met outside the world's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] by a patrol consisting of an [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] and its [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln space superiority starfighters]]. The freighter then [[Space warfare/Legends|fought off]] the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and ultimately jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], although the Imperials eventually traced it to Karinda.<ref name="MilkRun" />
{{Endgame}}

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|NavStar Transport Freighter Arion Star, please transmit your landing permit code. If you have no permit, you will enter a parking orbit and wait until an application can be processed.|Greyman's Planet authorities|<ref name="MilkRun" />}}
Greyman's Planet was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrialized world]]. Starships visiting the planet without a landing permit had to enter a parking [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and wait there until an application for a permit could be processed. A [[Cantina/Legends|tavern]] situated near the planet's Da'Harrin Spaceport catered specifically to off-worlders and was visited by members of various [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="MilkRun" />

==Locations==
A city was located on Greyman's Planet. It was the site of Da'Harrin Spaceport, which contained both a terminal for [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liners]] and their [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]], and the headquarters and [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] for the local planetary patrol force. A tavern was located near the spaceport, and the Galactic Empire also maintained a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] outside the city.<ref name="MilkRun" />

==Behind the scenes==
Greyman's Planet appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure "[[Milk Run]]," which was written by [[Sterling Hershey]]<ref name="MilkRun" /> and was run by the [[RPGA]] Network at the [[1991]] [[Gen Con Game Fair|Gen Con]] gaming convention.<ref name="GenCon">{{WebCite|url=https://www.sterlinghershey.com/freelance|text=freelance — STERLING HERSHEY|archivedate=20240122010627}}</ref> The adventure suggests that if, instead of engaging the Galactic Empire's patrol in combat, the player characters elect to return to Greyman's Planet's surface, they are arrested as Rebel Alliance sympathizers and [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]]. This article assumes the scenario plays out as described.<ref name="MilkRun" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Soarin [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Greyman's Planet, in grid square J-18.<ref name="TEA Soarin" />
